subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 07/16] exportd/mountd: add netlink support for svc_export cache

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch adds netlink-based support for the svc_export cache in the nfs-utils package, allowing userspace to receive notifications of pending export requests from the kernel and respond accordingly. The patch introduces two netlink sockets: one for multicast notifications and another for command processing. If the kernel does not support the necessary genetlink family or multicast group, the patch falls back to using the existing procfs channel mechanism. The approach taken is to integrate the new netlink-based mechanism alongside the existing procfs-based mechanism, ensuring safe coexistence and allowing userspace to respond to pending export requests in a timely manner.
